---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What problem does this solve? What DBA workflow does it improve?

**Proposed solution**
How should it work? CLI command, policy file change, new agent, etc.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Database types, scale, team size, or other relevant details.
